entries.title: Append-Only Ledger Migration — Design
verified_against: spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21): moved under outbound-actions/implementation/; event-sourced writers still NOT implemented
PR A additive event_type column shipped (migration 0023 + action_ledger_event_type_test.go); RecordOutcomeForOutbound / RecordEngagementRevoked writers absent
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24D; moved under outbound-actions/implementation/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Self-labelled 'design (no code)' — the migration to an event-sourced action_ledger is NOT yet implemented; the remaining 2 UPDATE violations it targets are real and tracked by scripts/check_topology.sh (baseline lowered 3 -> 2 by ARCHST-R1). PR A additive event_type column shipped; writers/readers remain proposed. Kept draft/proposed until the implementation PR.

entries.title: Outbound Actions — V2 Refactor Staged Plan
verified_against: spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21): content-preserving extraction of v2-outbound-refactor-design §0/§1/§2.2/§6-§11
PR1 shipped (internal/store/outbound/dedup.go + action_policies seeds); PR2 cleanup (status column drop, renames, file split) not yet built
entries.notes: Staged PR1/PR2 plan extracted verbatim from the V2 outbound refactor design during the spec IA mega sprint: revision history, per-PR scope, risks, acceptance criteria, resolved decisions, non-goals. PR1 shipped; PR2 breaking cleanup staged. Normative invariants stay in ../technical.md.

entries.title: V2.5 Umbrella Plan — Templates/Telegram/Copilot (Ancestor Draft)
verified_against: core verified-state-centric invariants now codified in active runtime-topology + v2-outbound-refactor-design + append-only-ledger-migration
entries.notes: Relocated in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21; v1 metadata kept — cross-cutting stale/draft plan). Reviewed in PR24G. Broad v2.5 umbrella architecture plan (Outbound Invariant -> Engagement Ledger -> Templates -> Telegram -> Copilot). Its core verified-state-centric / append-only invariants have since been decomposed into and shipped via the now-authoritative active specs (runtime-topology, v2-outbound-refactor-design, append-only-ledger-migration); the Templates/Copilot portions remain forward-looking. Kept draft as ancestor architecture reference, not active, to avoid duplicating the authoritative specs.

entries.title: Outbound Actions — Technical Contract (V2 Outbound Refactor)
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24D; promoted to outbound-actions/technical.md in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). PR1 (action_policies table + policy-driven dedup, transition ledger rows, 7 global functions deleted, tenant isolation) is reflected in internal/store/outbound. PR2 (drop legacy status column + split outbound.go) remains staged -> partial. Staged plan/risks/acceptance extracted verbatim to implementation/refactor-plan.md; this file keeps the normative invariants.
